_meta.rules: Filings-as-filed. Every figure traces to a primary document (SEC EDGAR filing or issuer/lender release). Undisclosed stays undisclosed — no estimates. Retired instruments are excluded from `instruments` and listed in `retired`.

status_flags.confirmed: Company, lender, or arranger statement (SEC filing or official release)
status_flags.press: Journalist-sourced reporting (Bloomberg/Reuters/FT/The Information/CNBC); no primary-party release
status_flags.rumored: In talks / unnamed sources; no close announced

rate_kinds.floating_other: Floating over a non-SOFR benchmark (TIBOR, EURIBOR, CORRA, prime, fed funds, sovereign reference); benchmark in note. Extends the brief's enum — these rates are disclosed but not SOFR-linked.
rate_kinds.undisclosed: Not stated in any filing or release

_meta.size_convention: size_usd_m = latest-reported principal outstanding where filed; committed/face where drawn balances are undisclosed (see size_note). Non-USD sizes use the USD equivalents reported in the filings themselves.

instruments.name: DDTL 1.0

rate.note: Originally 3M Term SOFR + 8.75%; amended 5/15/24 to SOFR + 9.6196%; effective ~15% per 10-Q

instruments.security: 1st-priority pledge of CCAC II equity + substantially all assets (GPU servers financed under customer contracts); amortization tied to depreciated GPU purchase price

instruments.name: DDTL 2.0

rate.note: Pre-Fifth-Amendment grid: SOFR + 6.00-6.50% (investment-grade contract loans) / SOFR + 13.00% (non-IG). Fifth Amendment (8-K 10/2/25): all new draws SOFR + 4.25% (or base rate + 3.25%), flat; 1.50% upfront on draws, 3.00% commitment fee on undrawn below $2.4B. Effective ~11% per 10-Q.

instruments.maturity_note: Each draw 5-yr; quarterly amortization from Jan 2026
instruments.security: CCAC IV equity + all assets; borrowing base = % of depreciated GPU-server cost (credit-agreement schedule; treatment by customer rating not restated in the Fifth Amendment 8-K rate section)

instruments.entity: CCAC IV LLC (incremental tranche to DDTL 2.0)
instruments.name: DDTL 2.1 ($3.0B incremental tranche)

rate.note: SOFR + 4.25%; 1.50% upfront/draw; 3.00% commitment fee below $2.4B drawn; effective ~9% per filings

instruments.security: Equipment for investment-grade and unrated strategic customers

instruments.name: DDTL 3.0

rate.note: Daily SOFR + 4.00%; 0.50% undrawn fee; effective ~9% per filings

instruments.seniority: Senior secured (SPV); parent guarantee of CCAC VII
instruments.security: Substantially all CCAC VII assets + 100% equity; GPU servers under a long-term OpenAI agreement (OpenAI is the offtaker/revenue source, unrated; contract not stated as pledged collateral); DSCR ≥1.40x from Apr 2027

source.doc: 8-K 7/31/25 (DDTL 3.0); First Amendment 8-K 1/2/26; CoreWeave IR release 7/28/25 names OpenAI offtake

instruments.name: DDTL 4.0

rate.note: ~$4.5B floating daily SOFR + 2.25%; ~$4.0B fixed 2.00% + blended UST (WAL 3.14y); 0.50% undrawn; effective ~7% per filings

instruments.security: All CCAC VIII assets + equity; sized to depreciable equipment cost + projected DSCR ≥1.15x; ≥95% rate hedging + power hedging required. Anchored by an investment-grade Meta offtake contract (~$19B backlog) — first IG-rated GPU-backed financing (A3 Moody's / A-low DBRS), per CoreWeave release + Bloomberg 2026-03-31.

instruments.name: DDTL 5.0
instruments.size_note: $3.1B committed; drawn balance undisclosed (draws through Sep 2026)
instruments.security: All borrower assets + 100% equity; GPU servers for 2 non-IG (unrated) customer contracts; DSCR ≥1.35x

Senior Secured Revolving Credit Facility
instruments.security: Substantially all Company assets; minimum-liquidity covenant. Context (8-K 2026-07-06): sub Raylan Data signed a 20-yr ~401 MW Hawesville lease with Anthropic (press ~$19B; payments ‘expected to be supported by an investment-grade credit’) — lessor-side offtake, tracked for the financing it will support, not as a ledger row; same 8-K: sold the 50.1% stake in Fluidstack JV FS CS I (Abernathy, TX — 168 MW; distinct campus and financing from the Meridian Arc/Indiana structure) to Fluidstack-led purchasers for ~$530M in three installments. Watch: Abernathy project debt ($1.3B of Fluidstack lease obligations Google-backstopped per Oct-2025 8-K) has not publicly priced — a future row when it does.
